title: Kuryente Watch
subtitle: A community-driven app that provides community-sourced information on the status of electricity for each of our town's Barangay.

title: Manong Pabili
subtitle: Mobile street vendors trades visibility to mobility. Manong Pabili aims to bring back visibility by providing a platform where customers can find where they are.
